title: stachys asperata
intro: Stachys asperata, also known as Prickly Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Stachys asperata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. In herbal preparations, Stachys asperata is often used as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
